name: Robo Reckoning
short_description: A Casual Singleplayer game that lets the player explore the open world map. Made with low poly design and family friendly vibes to give a relaxing experience.
detailed_description:
Embark on a Singleplayer Adventure with Rio


In this Top-Down shooter adventure you play as Rio who is one of the few survivors of the Robot revolution. He aims to take back the city and free the humanity from this robot revolt. Through missions and puzzles in an open 3D Top-Down Low-Poly Enviroment: Drive cars, shoot robots, Explore different Biomes!

Made by Vasileios Pagkratis, my first game made in unity and published in Steam!
